texto: I am staring into eyes so dark and compelling that I feel as if I could easily lose myself within them. He moves me slightly away from his body but doesn't let go. Energy, just like in the forest a few nights ago, ebbs and flows betwen us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jennifer Sucevic: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I am staring into eyes so dark and compelling that I feel as if I could easily lose myself within…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fantasy, staring pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
